Main - Training

Learning how to work with the system

SP!RES technology is effective only in the right hands. We offer a full-fledged training course for your specialists, which guarantees the correct application of the system and maximum results at the facilities.

The training is designed to turn your team into experts in trenchless rehabilitation in the shortest possible time. You get not just instructions, but constant support and access to relevant materials.

Key learning outcomes:
  • Your employees work confidently with the SP!RES system
  • The human factor is eliminated due to the understanding of automated processes
  • Improving customer service quality
  • Official certification of specialists
Get a training consultation

[ How is the training going ]

Learning formats: from theory to on-site practice

We understand that each company has its own schedule and training level. Therefore, we offer several formats that can be combined.

1

Video tutorials and mobile app (Quick Start)

A basic package for self-study. Video tutorials are available 24/7 and are divided into stages: equipment preparation, liner installation, inversion start, parameter control, and calibration sleeve extraction. A mobile app with real-time support and tips will be available soon.

For whom:

For operators who want to refresh their knowledge, and for new employees at the induction stage.

2

Offline course with an engineer (on-site practice)

Intensive course under the guidance of a technical specialist SP!RES. It includes a theoretical part and full-fledged practice at a real facility or landfill. The engineer shows all the nuances of the work, analyzes complex cases and answers questions.

For whom:

For teams that enter facilities with SP!RES for the first time.

3

Certification and professional development

After successful completion of the training, specialists receive an official SP!RES certificate confirming their qualifications. The certificate can be presented to customers when participating in tenders or executing municipal orders.

For whom:

For companies that want to highlight their advantage over competitors and confirm the professionalism of the team.

[ What is it necessary for ]

Why learning is an investment, not an expense

Many people think, "We've bought the equipment, we'll figure it out for ourselves." But practice shows that a lack of skills leads to mistakes, damage to materials, and missed deadlines.

Saving materials

The correct calculation of the polymerization pressure and time eliminates defects

Safety

Working with pressure and coolant requires an understanding of the processes

Customer's trust

Customers are more willing to work with certified contractors.

Legal purity

You will know exactly how a document-valid report is generated.

Confidence

Your team is not afraid of difficult areas and hard-to-reach places

[ Support ]

We don't abandon graduates.

The training does not end with obtaining a certificate. We accompany our clients at all stages of the SP!RES operation.

Get a consultation
1

Constant access to video instructions

and updates to materials

2

Consulting engineers

by phone and in messengers (work chats)

3

Network of training centers

the opportunity to retrain in any region

4

The future: a 24/7-enabled mobile app

where can I quickly find the answer for a specific pipe model or diameter
